name: BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
notes:
Detects files that are in sensitive paths. Sensitive paths are defined in the Sensitive File Paths reference set. 

Note: The Sensitive File Paths reference set must be populated.
bb_references: BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Files in Sensitive Directories - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Files in Sensitive Directories - AlphaNumeric
